use_cases: Image portfolio and gallery showcase with interactive hover expansion
Product gallery on e-commerce sites with click-to-expand lightbox
Interactive photo browsing experience with smooth transitions
Creative agency portfolio with animated image grid
Photography showcase with hover-driven layout dynamics
ai_summary: An expandable horizontal image gallery that animates flex values on hover, creating an interactive expansion effect where hovered images grow while others shrink. Features click-to-open lightbox functionality with previous/next navigation. Built with Framer Motion for smooth transitions and includes a semi-transparent overlay effect on images. Suitable for media portfolios, product galleries, and creative showcases requiring dynamic image presentation.
